features: Deep Cleansing: Advanced charcoal clay formula penetrates deep into pores to remove impurities, excess oil, and blackheads for a thorough skin detoxification
Natural Ingredients: Formulated with pure clay minerals and activated charcoal to absorb toxins and draw out skin imperfections while maintaining skin's natural balance
Pore Refining: Regular use helps minimize the appearance of pores and improves overall skin texture for a smoother, more refined complexion
Skin Purification: Powerful detoxifying properties help combat environmental pollutants and clear congested skin for a fresh, revitalized appearance
Easy Application: Smooth, creamy 100ml formula spreads easily across the face and neck, drying to a comfortable finish that rinses off effortlessly
description: Product description Transform your skincare routine with this purifying Charcoal Clay Mask. Formulated to deeply cleanse and detoxify your skin, this 100ml treatment mask combines the powerful properties of charcoal and clay to draw out impurities and excess oils. Perfect for those seeking a thorough facial treatment that helps refine pores and refresh the complexion. The mask's smooth texture makes application easy, allowing you to enjoy a spa-like experience in the comfort of your home. Ingredients kaolin,activated charcoal
